first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. Both assign the same score (4/10) and use the same core reasoning: the candidate has extensive software experience but lacks the specific, recent C++ and industrial automation skills required for the role. The differences in wording between the two evaluations are minor rephrasings that fall within the scope of normal run-to-run noise. The change in the candidate's work location from international to US-based had no discernible impact on the assessment.
